//buildCommand: R1.6: exclude @agenticprimitives/contracts from the recursive build — its build script invokes `forge` (Foundry), which is not present in the Vercel build environment. No TS package imports @agenticprimitives/contracts (verified via `grep -r '@agenticprimitives/contracts' packages/*/src`), so the SA wiring demo-sso-next depends on works fine without the Solidity ABI re-emit.
